title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Shadowfax - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Shadowfax - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Shadowfax invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Digital Marketing Manager at our Nashik location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Shadowfax:
Shadowfax is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Shadowfax!
